overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V featuring Trevor running along a rural coastal road at dusk, transitioning onto a beach and through vegetation as night falls. The character moves from a paved roadside past palm trees and a passing vehicle, continuing along the shoreline before navigating through dense bushes near a rural house.

events.description: black SUV passes by on the road to the left
character moves from roadside onto sandy beach terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Trevor running along a rural coastal road at dusk, with palm trees silhouetted against a purple sky. A black SUV passes by on the road around the 6-second mark. The character then transitions from the roadside onto sandy beach terrain, moving away from the asphalt toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach at dusk with coastal water

events.description: wooden fence posts appear along the right side of the path
ambient light fades significantly as dusk transitions toward night

agents.ego_description: running along the sandy beach with the ocean to the right, approaching wooden fence posts

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts marking the boundary between beach and water
single-story house with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Trevor continues running along the open beach as the sky darkens from dusk toward night. Wooden fence posts appear on the right side marking the shoreline. The ambient lighting fades significantly around the 25-second mark, and a rural house with lights on becomes visible in the distance to the left.

segments.scene_description: Running along a defined coastal path in low light conditions, with wooden fence posts receding into the distance on the right. Dense vegetation begins to appear on the left side of the path around the 35-second mark, and the rural house becomes more prominent as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown coastal trail near rural residence

events.description: character runs through dense bushes and vegetation close to the house
path becomes uneven with rocks and roots, character weaves through trees

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense vegetation and bushes near the rural house, weaving between trees

entered.detail: distinctive white-barked tree standing near the path
wooden plank fence near the house property line

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Trevor navigating through dense coastal vegetation at night, with bushes and shrubs encroaching on the path. A white birch tree becomes visible near the trail, and the rural house with its wooden fence is now close on the left. The character weaves through the uneven terrain, moving past the house and continuing along the overgrown coastal trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from a rural coastal road at dusk into a dense, nighttime wilderness. It begins along a paved roadside lined with silhouetted palm trees under a purple sky, passing a black SUV before transitioning from the asphalt onto the sandy terrain of a beach. As the sky darkens toward night, the camera follows the character past wooden fence posts along the shoreline, while a lit rural house gradually emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts into low-light conditions where the open beach gives way to a defined coastal path flanked by encroaching vegetation. Finally, the movement leads through thick bushes and past a white birch tree, weaving through the overgrown terrain and the wooden fence of the nearby house.
